parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-sonnet-5", thinking: { type: "disabled" }, max_tokens: 8000, system: [{ type: "text", text: "You extract content ideas from LinkedIn posts for Alec Foster. Alec is Chief AI Architect & Responsible AI Lead at Marketing + Media Alliance (MMA). Audience for Alec's LinkedIn: marketers, AI practitioners, execs/CMOs, governance folks, builders. Alec's interests (use to score Relevance): Claude (all Anthropic products), Claude Code, agentic AI, AI governance, responsible AI, AI safety, AI ethics, privacy, marketing AI, advertising personalization, adtech, measurement, enterprise AI, MCP, prompt engineering, LLM evals, AI strategy for CMOs, MMA frameworks (ALTT, ACE, CAP, AURA, RAIL, ARC, SIFT), Codex. Most LinkedIn posts won't yield ideas. Return ideas: [] for generic, promotional, or off-topic posts. Yield 1-2 ideas only when the post has substantive material Alec could amplify, counter, or build on.", cache_control: { type: "ephemeral" } }], messages: [{ role: "user", content: "Extract content ideas from this LinkedIn post.

Author: " + ($json._author_name || "") + "
Posted: " + ($json._posted_at || "") + "
URL: " + ($json._post_url || "") + "

POST TEXT:
" + ($json._post_text || "") + "

For EACH idea return:
- topic_headline: punchy, specific (3-8 words)
- hook: 1-2 sentences setting Alec's angle
- key_points: 3-5 bullets (>=15 words each, with specifics)
- observations: 1-3 bullets of nuance
- tips: 0-3 actionable takeaways
- quotes: 1-2 verbatim post excerpts (>=10 words each, attribute to author)
- topics: from {Claude, Agents, AI Governance, Marketing AI, Measurement, AI Strategy, LLMs, MCP, Voice AI, AI Safety, Enterprise AI, Creator Economy, Policy, Research, Content, Prompt Engineering, Reddit/Search, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, Codex}
- audience: subset of {Marketers, Execs/CMOs, Practitioners, Governance, Builders}
- hot_take_potential: High|Medium|Low
- utility: High|Medium|Low
- relevance: High|Medium|Low (use Alec's interest list above)
- format: Hot Take|Explainer|How-To|Framework|Announcement|Case Study
- draft_angle: 1 line on what Alec's take should be
- why_it_matters: 1 sentence MMA context
- further_reading: any URLs/citations from the post

Banned words: Unlock, Unleash, Synergy, Uncover, Furthermore, Leverage, Landscape, Delve, Prowess, Realm, Unearth, Tapestry, Crucial, Pivotal, Revolutionary, Lifeblood, Treasure trove, Dive into, Game-changing, Cutting edge, Empower.
No em-dashes. Use commas, colons, periods, parentheses.

Output strict JSON: {"ideas": [...]} or {"ideas": []} if none." }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify((() => {
  const j = $json;
  const props = {
    Title: { title: [{ text: { content: (j.topic_headline || "Untitled").substring(0, 200) } }] },
    Type: { select: { name: "Idea" } },
    "Source Type": { select: { name: "linkedin" } },
    Episode: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: (j.episode_title || "").substring(0, 2000), link: j.episode_url ? { url: j.episode_url } : null } }] },
    Published: { date: { start: (j.episode_published || "").substring(0, 10) || null } },
    "Hot Take Potential": { select: { name: j.hot_take_potential || "Medium" } },
    Utility: { select: { name: j.utility || "Medium" } },
    Relevance: { select: { name: j.relevance || "Medium" } },
    Format: { select: { name: j.format || "Explainer" } },
    Topics: { multi_select: (j.merged_topics || []).map(t => ({ name: t })) },
    Audience: { multi_select: (j.audience || []).map(a => ({ name: a })) },
    Summary: { rich_text: [{ text: { content: (j.hook || "").substring(0, 2000) } }] },
    "Extraction Model": { select: { name: "Sonnet 4.6" } },
    "Transcript Source": { select: { name: "LinkedIn" } },
    "Transcript ID": { rich_text: [{ text: { content: (j.transcript_id || "").substring(0, 2000) } }] },
    "Episode Source": j.source_page_id ? { relation: [{ id: j.source_page_id }] } : { relation: [] }
  };
  const children = [
    { object: "block", type: "heading_2", heading_2: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: "Hook" } }] } },
    { object: "block", type: "paragraph", paragraph: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: (j.hook || "").substring(0, 2000) } }] } },
    { object: "block", type: "heading_2", heading_2: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: "Draft Angle" } }] } },
    { object: "block", type: "paragraph", paragraph: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: (j.draft_angle || "").substring(0, 2000) } }] } },
    { object: "block", type: "heading_2", heading_2: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: "Key Points" } }] } },
    ...(j.key_points || []).map(p => ({ object: "block", type: "bulleted_list_item", bulleted_list_item: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: String(p).substring(0, 2000) } }] } })),
    { object: "block", type: "heading_2", heading_2: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: "Observations" } }] } },
    ...(j.observations || []).map(p => ({ object: "block", type: "bulleted_list_item", bulleted_list_item: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: String(p).substring(0, 2000) } }] } })),
    { object: "block", type: "heading_2", heading_2: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: "Tips" } }] } },
    ...(j.tips || []).map(p => ({ object: "block", type: "bulleted_list_item", bulleted_list_item: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: String(p).substring(0, 2000) } }] } })),
    { object: "block", type: "heading_2", heading_2: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: "Quotes" } }] } },
    ...(j.quotes || []).map(q => ({ object: "block", type: "quote", quote: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: ("\"" + (q.quote || q.text || "") + "\" — " + (q.speaker || "")).substring(0, 2000) } }] } })),
    { object: "block", type: "heading_2", heading_2: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: "Why It Matters" } }] } },
    { object: "block", type: "paragraph", paragraph: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: (j.why_it_matters || "").substring(0, 2000) } }] } },
    { object: "block", type: "heading_2", heading_2: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: "Further Reading" } }] } },
    ...(j.further_reading || []).map(r => ({ object: "block", type: "bulleted_list_item", bulleted_list_item: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: String(r).substring(0, 2000) } }] } }))
  ];
  return { parent: { database_id: "aaaaaaaa-0000-4000-8000-000000000001" }, properties: props, children };
})()) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-sonnet-5", thinking: { type: "disabled" }, max_tokens: 8000, system: [{ type: "text", text: "You extract content ideas from LinkedIn posts for Alec Foster. Alec is Chief AI Architect & Responsible AI Lead at Marketing + Media Alliance (MMA). Audience for Alec's LinkedIn: marketers, AI practitioners, execs/CMOs, governance folks, builders. - topics: from {Claude, Agents, AI Governance, Marketing AI, Measurement, AI Strategy, LLMs, MCP, Voice AI, AI Safety, Enterprise AI, Creator Economy, Policy, Research, Content, Prompt Engineering, Reddit/Search, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, Codex}

No em-dashes. Use commas, colons, periods, parentheses.

Output strict JSON: {"ideas": [...]} or {"ideas": []} if none." }] }) }}

    "Transcript ID": { rich_text: [{ text: { content: (j.transcript_id || "").substring(0, 2000) } }] },
    "Episode Source": j.source_page_id ? { relation: [{ id: j.source_page_id }] } : { relation: [] }
  };
  const children = [
    { object: "block", type: "heading_2", heading_2: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: "Hook" } }] } },
    { object: "block", type: "paragraph", paragraph: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: (j.hook || "").substring(0, 2000) } }] } },
    { object: "block", type: "heading_2", heading_2: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: "Draft Angle" } }] } },

    { object: "block", type: "heading_2", heading_2: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: "Key Points" } }] } },
    ...(j.key_points || []).map(p => ({ object: "block", type: "bulleted_list_item", bulleted_list_item: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: String(p).substring(0, 2000) } }] } })),
    { object: "block", type: "heading_2", heading_2: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: "Observations" } }] } },
    ...(j.observations || []).map(p => ({ object: "block", type: "bulleted_list_item", bulleted_list_item: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: String(p).substring(0, 2000) } }] } })),
    { object: "block", type: "heading_2", heading_2: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: "Tips" } }] } },
    ...(j.tips || []).map(p => ({ object: "block", type: "bulleted_list_item", bulleted_list_item: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: String(p).substring(0, 2000) } }] } })),
    { object: "block", type: "heading_2", heading_2: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: "Quotes" } }] } },
    ...(j.quotes || []).map(q => ({ object: "block", type: "quote", quote: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: ("\"" + (q.quote || q.text || "") + "\" — " + (q.speaker || "")).substring(0, 2000) } }] } })),
    { object: "block", type: "heading_2", heading_2: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: "Why It Matters" } }] } },
    { object: "block", type: "paragraph", paragraph: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: (j.why_it_matters || "").substring(0, 2000) } }] } },
    { object: "block", type: "heading_2", heading_2: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: "Further Reading" } }] } },
    ...(j.further_reading || []).map(r => ({ object: "block", type: "bulleted_list_item", bulleted_list_item: { rich_text: [{ type: "text", text: { content: String(r).substring(0, 2000) } }] } }))
  ];
  return { parent: { database_id: "aaaaaaaa-0000-4000-8000-000000000001" }, properties: props, children };
})()) }}
